mapper.select: /* 신재생유형별 현황 */ SELECT SUM(daily_pwr) sum_daily_inv_pwr , 310000 AS sum_predict_inv_pwr , 200 as sum_daily_wind_pwr , 300 as sum_predict_wind_pwr , 0 as sum_daily_ess_pwr , 0 as sum_predict_ess_pwr FROM tb_device_inverter dv WHERE DATE_FORMAT(update_date, '%Y%m%d') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')

/* 오늘자 사업소별 현황 */ SELECT st.site_id , st.site_name , dv.daily_pwr , dv.daily_pwr + 100 AS predict_pwr FROM tb_device_inverter dv INNER JOIN tb_site st ON dv.site_id = st.site_id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(update_date,'%Y%m%d') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') GROUP BY dv.site_id

/* 월 전체 사이트 발전량 추이 (날짜별 출력, 전월비교) */ SELECT case when substr(DATE_FORMAT(dv.update_date, '%Y%m%d'), 1, 6) = #{selectMonth} then 1 ELSE 2 END AS thismonth , cast(substr(date_format(dv.update_date, '%Y%m%d'), 7, 2) AS UNSIGNED) AS day , SUM(daily_pwr) AS sum_pwr FROM tb_device_inverter dv WHERE date_format(dv.update_date, '%Y%m') IN (#{selectMonth}, date_format(date_sub(str_to_date(CONCAT(#{selectMonth},'01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y%m')) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(dv.update_date, '%Y%m%d') ORDER BY thismonth, DATE_FORMAT(dv.update_date, '%Y%m%d')

/* 년 전체 사이트 발전량 추이 (월별 출력, 전년비교) */ SELECT case when substr(DATE_FORMAT(dv.update_date, '%Y%m'), 1, 4) = #{selectYear} then 1 ELSE 2 END AS thisyear , cast(substr(date_format(dv.update_date, '%Y%m'), 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) AS month , SUM(daily_pwr) AS sum_pwr FROM tb_device_inverter dv WHERE date_format(dv.update_date, '%Y') IN (#{selectYear}, date_format(date_sub(str_to_date(CONCAT(#{selectYear},'0101'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 year), '%Y')) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(dv.update_date, '%Y%m') ORDER BY thisyear, DATE_FORMAT(dv.update_date, '%Y%m')
/* 데이터 존재하는 년월 */ SELECT date_format(dv.update_date, '%Y%m') AS dataMonth FROM tb_device_inverter dv GROUP BY date_format(dv.update_date, '%Y%m') ORDER BY date_format(dv.update_date, '%Y%m')

/* 사이트별 인버터갯수, (금일, 이번달, 올해)발전량, 예상발전량, 이용률, ... */ SELECT dv.site_id , st.site_name , COUNT(distinct dv.inverter_id) AS inv_cnt , SUM(dv.daily_pwr) as daily_pwr , SUM(dv.daily_pwr + 100) as predict_pwr , round(SUM(dv.daily_pwr) / SUM(dv.daily_pwr + 100) * 100 * 100)/100 AS use_rate
, 25 AS alarm_cnt FROM tb_device_inverter dv INNER JOIN tb_site st ON dv.site_id = st.site_id
WHERE 1=1
and DATE_FORMAT(update_date, '%Y%m%d') = date_format(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(update_date, '%Y%m') = date_format(NOW(), '%Y%m')
and DATE_FORMAT(update_date, '%Y') = date_format(NOW(), '%Y')
GROUP BY dv.site_id

/* 인버터 오류정보 (사이트명-장치명-오류내용-일시) */ SELECT st.site_id , st.site_name , al.device_type , al.device_id , al.alarm_msg , al.std_date FROM tb_alarm al INNER JOIN tb_site st ON al.site_id = st.site_id WHERE 1=1
and al.alarm_act_yn = 'N' AND al.device_type = 'I'
